Given the user is on the Home screen
When the user taps on the 'My Account' tab
Then the app navigates to the My Account screen showing user profile information and account details

Given the user is on the Home screen
When the user taps on the 'Notifications' tab
Then the app navigates to the Notifications screen and displays the user's notifications

Given the user is on the Home screen
When the user taps on the 'Bookings' tab
Then the app navigates to the Bookings screen and displays the user's current and past bookings

Given the user is on the My Account screen
When the user updates their profile information and saves changes
Then the app displays a confirmation message and the updated profile information is shown

Given the user is on the Notifications screen
When the user taps on a notification
Then the app displays the notification details or navigates to the related content

Given the user is on the Bookings screen
When the user taps on a booking entry
Then the app displays the booking details for the selected booking

Given the user is on the Home screen
When the user receives a new notification
Then a notification badge appears on the Notifications tab indicating unread notifications

Given the user is on the My Account screen
When the user logs out
Then the app logs the user out and navigates to the login screen
